name: Claude Bolling
description: French jazz musician, composer and pianist (1930–2020)
abstract: Claude Bolling (10 April 1930 – 29 December 2020) was a French jazz pianist, composer, arranger, and occasional actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: This time, it was with a young French pianist named Claude Bolling... Claude was going to work in the club St. Germain des Prés... he made me two propositions... being a regular member of the band. The last one was moreinteresting for me... and that's the one I went for.

about_quotes.speaker: Big Chielf Moore
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Claude Bolling in the context of a recording, but the interviewee does not respond with any personal anecdote, confirmation of meeting, or description of a working relationship, only a general comment about French musicians.

about_quotes.speaker: Freddie Moore
about_quotes.evidence: Claude Bolling was a piano player, a young boy during that time. He could play all different styles...
